VERSION CONTROL.content: General Document Automation as a Service – Service Description Owner of document Marianne Asscherickx Date 19/02/2025 Current version 1.0 Version Control Table Version Date Remarks  / change log Author 0.1 04/02/2025 First draft Jess Dupont 1.0 19/02/2025 Version 1.0 published Jess Dupont Reviewers Version Distribution to – Name of person Function / Role 0.1 Marianne Asscherickx Product manager  Approval Version Approval date Approved by (name person + role/function Reference Version Date Name Document Remarks

Service summary.content: With Automation as a Service we focus on automating repetitive tasks or services to improve efficiency and reduce errors. From a technology point-of-view we use the Cegeka Hybrid Cloud standard software tools to streamline processes and enhance service delivery across various sectors. Key aspects of Service Automation

Standard Services.content: Provide automation support for the HC and DWP competences from ideation over analysis & design to implementation phase Automation support has to be considered on different levels and aspects: Automation requests are collected & consolidated based on the input of the other competences (technical CC’s within delivery, change management & architecture)

Service Request.content: Requests related to this Service can be ordered and will result in the execution of that request by means of a Cegeka change order. Each request has a throughput time to deliver the request (after approval or pre-approval on the customer’s CAB). Service request id service request Throughput time User mgmt. (add, remove, delete, etc) OS mgmt. activities (disk extensions, CPU, reboot, etc) DB and application mgmt (MFT, DB, IWS, AMQ etc)

Out of scope.content: Everything that is not explicitly mentioned in this service descriptions is by default out of scope.

Prerequisites & Conditions.content: The tooling to support automations needs to be provided and maintained by Cegeka competence teams. For example: A test environment will be set up to test the automations for HC, DWP and DIO.

Cegeka owned licenses and/or subscriptio.content: These licenses and/or subscriptions and their cost are included in this Service. It is Cegeka’s responsibility to maintain license and/or subscription compliance. Licenses and/or subscriptions used for Enabling Services are included in the Service and are not listed below. License included in service applies to 300 Atlassian licenses yes Atlassian tools (Jira & Confluence) Yearly renewable

Customer owned licenses and/or subscript.content: These licenses and/or subscriptions and their cost are not included in this Service. It is Customer responsibility to maintain license and/or subscription compliance. License description/remarks Horizon Optional license (product) to be purchased from Cegeka when the customer wishes to access the automations via Horizon

Location.content: This Service is not delivered from within the Customer premises. Only from the Cegeka (virtual) Office Environment.

Ownership.content: All development and hardware used to disclose the automations remains property of Cegeka. Scripts and automation flows are intellectual property of Cegeka, even the ones specifically developed for the customer.

RACI Matrix.content: Listed below are the activities related to the Service, the activities RACI related to enabling services are listed in the Enabling Services Document. ACTIVITY CUSTOMER CEGEKA          RACI Role definition

Service Window.content: SERVICE WINDOWS DESCRIPTION SERVICE CEGEKA OFFICE HOURS 8x5: 9AM – 5PM CET, Monday up to and including Friday – business day Applicable for standard and optional service CEGEKA EXTENDED OFFICE HOURS 12x5: 7AM – 7PM CET, Monday up to and including Friday – business day [N/A] CEGEKA 24X7 24x7 [N/A]

Service Level.content: Definition Calculation Service Window Assumptions Frequency Objectives (SLA) Incident SLA according to Outsourcing governance will be handled

Service Billing.content: Measurement The quantity of each billing element is determined on a mentioned frequency basis (e.g. monthly): Calculation / Billing The price(s) is/are determined in the pricing schedule where this Service is residing. The Service is billed per billing element:

Standard Service Billing.content: id Component Billing element BILLING UNIT frequency Z5xxxx Backend automations used Calculation of backend automation runs on a yearly basis Price per backend automation run (re-calculated each year) Monthly billing Z5xxxx Frontend automations used Calculation of frontend automation runs on a yearly basis Price per frontend automation run (re-calculated each year) Monthly billing
